training.recommendation: Focus on an easy 3-4 mile run to build consistency at an aerobic pace. Use the run to stay light and relaxed, maintaining knee health.
training.reasoning: Your current running fitness is rebuilding. Recent runs have been easy, fitting the goal of gradual volume increase. Consistency is key at this stage.
training.caution: Ensure that the run remains comfortable enough to prevent any knee discomfort. Avoid increasing distance or intensity prematurely.
cooldown: light stretching for hips and calves
training.optional: Add a 10-minute core stability routine if you feel up for it.
training.skip: If you feel any knee discomfort, opt for a mobility workout instead.

alternatives.recommendation: Count surf as the main activity and integrate short mobility work post-surf.

readiness.note: Your high energy and solid sleep make it a good day for aerobic base work.

liftProgram.why: Ensure balanced development and support for upper body strength supporting activities like surfing.

movementMenu.recommendation: Quick stretch and mobility routine focusing on hips and ankles.
Core and balance routine integrating planks, side planks, and bird-dogs.
Full-body mobility and flexibility session, incorporating yoga flows.
Extended easy run combined with a thorough core and hip stability workout.
